@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+export type EmbeddedContextFile = { path: string; content: string };
+
+export type FailoverReason =
+  | "auth"
+  | "format"
+  | "rate_limit"
+  | "billing"
+  | "timeout"
+  | "unknown";
